D:\arm_gcc\bin\arm-none-eabi-gcc.exe  -mcpu=cortex-m3 -mthumb -Os -g -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -Wall -Wextra -D__weak=__attribute__((weak)) -g  -mcpu=cortex-m3 -mthumb -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--print-memory-usage -TD:/A_STM32_learn/F103/bms_rtthread_Cmake/firmware/comsis/core/BMS_gcc.ld -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--print-memory-usage -Wl,-Map=BMS_STM32F103.map --specs=nosys.specs --specs=nano.specs @CMakeFiles\BMS_STM32F103.elf.dir\objects1.rsp -o BMS_STM32F103.elf  -lm
